description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa has three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion for the main section, with an additional cushion for the chaise. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive, boxy silhouette. The legs are short, minimally visible, and likely made of dark plastic or wood, providing subtle elevation. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, giving the sofa a clean, contemporary look. This piece is designed for comfort and functionality, suitable for both indoor and semi-sheltered urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped beige sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, three back cushions, and broad, straight armrests. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, and the chaise lounge extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the uniform height of the backrest and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seating area and the straight armrest on the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions (one for the main section, one for the chaise), all uniform in size and shape, arranged in a sectional L-shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and likely under the chaise, minimally visible, possibly made of dark plastic or wood, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, and uniform beige fabric with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
